metadata.title: MuSc: Zero-Shot Industrial Anomaly Classification and Segmentation with Mutual Scoring of the Unlabeled Images
organizations: 1Huazhong University of Science and Technology,2Artificial Intelligence Research Institute, Wuhan JingCe Electronic Group Co.,LTD,3University of Trento

sections.title: Motivation
content: Arich amountof normal information implicit in unlabeled test images can be exploited for anomaly detection.
Adiscriminative characteristic: the normal image patches could find a relatively large number of similar patches in other unlabeled images, while the abnormal ones only have a few similar patches.

figures.description: MVTec AD dataset normal vs abnormal pixel distribution pie chart

Visual comparison of normal and abnormal patches across different objects

sections.title: Contributions
content: Thefirst methodthatonly uses the unlabeled test imagesfor industrial anomaly detection.
We reveal the potential capability of normal and abnormal patches contained in unlabeled images.
21.1% PRO gainsand21.9% seg-AP gainson MVTec AD and19.4% seg-AP gainson VisA.
